Module InventoryManager
Package app

Class ShoppingCart

java.lang.Object
app.ShoppingCart
public class ShoppingCart extends Object
This class represents the user's shopping cart. It stores products the user has selected to purchase.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ShoppingCart()
    Constructor that creates the shopping cart list.

    Displays the cart contents.

    Returns the cart items.

    Calculates the cart total.

  • Method Details

    • addToCart

      public void addToCart(SalableProduct product, int amount)
      Adds a product to the cart.
      Parameters:
      product - The product to add
      amount - The quantity

    • removeFromCart

      public boolean removeFromCart(String name)
      Removes a product from the cart.
      Parameters:
      name - The product name
      Returns:
      true if removed

      Returns the cart items.
